Editor_WorkInProgress_Body: Would you like to continue where you left of last time?
Editor_ResourceMeter_Info_Message: This gizmo shows how much space you have available. Levels above the limit cannot be published.
Menu_LevelLocked_Message: Beat {0} more levels to unlock this level!
Menu_WorldLocked_Message: Beat {0} more levels in this world to unlock next world!
Menu_EditorLocked_Message: Beat {0} more levels to unlock the Level Editor!
TermsOfService_Body: Before we continue, you have to accept Safari Forever Terms of Service.
Nickname_Rules:
1. Between 2 and 12 characters.

2. Only English characters.

3. Cannot be two underscores, two hypens or two spaces in a row.

4. Cannot have a underscore, hypen or space at the start or end.
Publish_BeatLevelToUploadFlyBy: Beat your level to share it!
Search_Body:
Try searching for:

Player ID ("Johste#0697")
Level Name ("Empty Colloquy")
Level ID ("zyfEhN")


Searches are case sensitive.
Error_UpdateGame_Body: This level is made with a newer version of the game. Please update to play it.
Error_Outdated_Body: This content is outdated and no longer compatible with later versions of the Safari Forever.
Menu_Options_ResetProgress_Body:
You cannot undo this action.
App will exit.
Editor_BuildLimit_Error_Body: This level is above the build limit. Remove some items and try again.
Cloudsaving_Restore_Enabled_Body: Your profile can now be restored.
Cloudsaving_Restore_Body: It looks like you played this game before, would you like restore your existing profile?
Cloudsaving_Restore_LastChance_Body: Your existing profile will become irreversible lost. You cannot undo this action.
Cloudsaving_Restore_Enable_Body: Enabling cloud saving lets you resume playing on another device even if your device is lost, destroyed, or traded in for a newer model.
Cloudsaving_GooglePlayGames_Preregistrat: Unable to sign in. What would you like to do?
Unable to fetch restore key. What would you like to do?
What would you like to do?
Have you played this game before?
Cloudsaving_GooglePlayGames_Postregistra: Unable to sign in at this time. Continuing without cloud saving. Try again later from settings.
Unable to upload restore key in at this time. Continuing without cloud saving. Try again later from settings.
Cloudsaving_GooglePlayGames_Settings_Err: Unable to sign in. What would you like to do?
Unable to upload restore key. What would you like to do?
Shop_Pingo_Body: Pingo is EXCLUSIVE to Alpha & Beta Players. Thank you for helping me make this the best game ever! <3
Notifications_PermissionPromt_Body: Would you like to get notified when you receive a message in Safari Forever?
Menu_Notifications_Options_FollowedPlaye: Someone I follow played my level
Menu_Notifications_Options_MyLevelIsLeve: One of my levels is level of the week
Menu_Notifications_Options_WorldRecordBe: Someone beats my world record in a level
Menu_Notifications_Options_NewDailyChall: A new daily challenge is announced
Menu_Notifications_Options_DailyChalleng: My daily challenge results are available
Menu_Notifications_Options_FollowedLiked: Someone I follow liked my level
Menu_Notifications_Options_FollowedPubli: Someone I follow published a level
Menu_Currency_Button_Body: Bananas can be earned by playing community created levels. Participate in the daily challenge and be on the lookout for the "3x<sprite name="Bananas_0" color=#FFFFFFFF>" icon to boost your bottom line!
Rewards_DailyChallengeParticipation_Desc: For participating in the daily challenge
Rewards_DailyChallengeThirdPlace_Descrip: For ranking third place in the daily challenge
Rewards_DailyChallengeSecondPlace_Descri: For ranking second place in the daily challenge
PrivacyPolicy_Body: Before we continue, you have to accept Safari Forever Privacy Policy.
Age_VerificationFailed: You need to be atleast 13 years old to use Safari Forever online functionality.
Shop_Adopt_NoLongerAvailable_Body: This character is no longer available.
Shop_Adopt_NotAvailable_Body: Its currently not possible to adopt this character.
Photos_PermissionPromt_Body_Ios: Safari Forever requires access to Photos to save gifs.
Photos_Saved_Body_Ios: Gif has been saved to Photos.
Photos_Saved_Body_Android: Gif has been saved to Gallery.
Photos_PermissionPromt_Body_Android: Safari Forever requires access to Gallery to save gifs.
Boost_Description: Spend bananas to make more people see your level. The more you boost the higher on the BOOSTED list your level will appear. Your level will stay on the list until it has received a good amount of plays.
Boost_EffectDescription: Boosting with <sprite name="Bananas_0" color=#FFFFFFFF>{0} bananas will move your level from #{1} <sprite name="Right" color=#FFFFFFFF> #{2}.
Credits_Page_1: Game by: Johannes Stensen Sound & Music: (Stereo Future Productions) Kristian Andersen Fredrik Martinsen Associate Level Designer: Øyvind Byhring
Credits_Page_2: Special Thanks Linn Helen Skrokbæk Kim Andre Thorsrud Michael Semple Ole Andreas Haley
Credits_Page_4: And a super special thank you to everyone in the community that keeps on giving everyday!
Analytics_Consent_Description:
Safari Forever would like your consent to collect analytical data.

This data is used to learn how to best improve Safari Forever for everyone.

You can withdraw permission at any time in the options menu.
Marketing_Consent_Description:
Safari Forever would like your consent to share data with other companies.

We do this to measure the performance of our ads.

Other companies can use this data to deliver you personalized ads.

You can withdraw permission at any time in the options menu.
Review_Page_1:
Hi! I hope you have been enjoying Safari Forever so far.

My name is Johannes and I spent 2.5 years making this game.

To make Safari Forever grow, I need your help. Would you consider recommending Safari Forever to a friend?
Review_Page_2:
Thank you! <3

Another way you can help is to give Safari Forever a 5 star rating.
Endless_Reroll_Body: Tired of this challenge? A new challenge can be yours for just <sprite name="Bananas_0" color=#FFFFFFFF> {0} measly bananas!
Endless_Error_NoMoreLevels: Could not find challenge. Try again later.
Endless_Unlock: Beat all levels to unlock Endless Mode!
Lottery_Description: Bet bananas to win hats! Higher bets increase your chance of winning.
Lottery_NoMoreRewards: No more rewards to win. Try again later.
Lottery_LessThanMinimumBet: You can't bet less than the minimum bet.
Cards_Description: One of the cards below contains a hat. Pick the right card and it's yours!
Cards_Dialog_Description: It costs <sprite name="Bananas_0" color=#FFFFFFFF> {0} to flip a card. You have <sprite name="Bananas_0" color=#FFFFFFFF> {1}. Would you like to flip this card?
